user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in search results in ChatGPT's search features
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for ChatGPT search results. Sites opted out will not appear in search answers.

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Ad landing pages only when submitted as ads. Data not used for training generative AI models.

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for OpenAI generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for content used in training generative AI models

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for live page responses in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs, may not respect robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Not applied to robots.txt; initiated by user requests, robots.txt rules may not apply

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collecting web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: Public web content for generative AI model enhancement and safety
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file; honors Crawl-delay extension

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users accessing websites during user-initiated queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered web access when individuals ask questions to Claude
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Search index enhancement and improving search result quality for users
user_agents.scope: Web crawling to analyze content and improve relevance and accuracy of search responses
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Build Google Search indexes and power search features
user_agents.scope: General web crawling for Google Search, Images, Video, News, and Discover

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Index images for Google Images and search image features
user_agents.scope: Crawls images and favicons across the web for Google Images and Search

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Index videos for video-related search features
user_agents.scope: Crawls video content for video-related Google Search features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Index content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: Crawls news content for Google News and news.google.com

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Index products for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Crawls product information for Google Shopping and Shopping tab

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Test and inspect pages for Search Console tools
user_agents.scope: Fetches pages for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various internal product research and development
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls for internal R&D by various Google product teams

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawling for internal product development
user_agents.scope: Crawls publicly accessible image URLs for internal R&D purposes

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawling for internal product development
user_agents.scope: Crawls publicly accessible video URLs for internal R&D purposes

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Index content for Vertex AI Agents requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for building Vertex AI Agents per site owner requests

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Collect training data for Gemini model development and grounding
user_agents.scope: Controls whether crawled content may be used for Gemini training and grounding

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result indexing; not used for AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt; verify IP addresses from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexitybot.json

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions and answer retrieval within Perplexity
user_agents.scope: User-requested fetches to help answer questions; generally ignores robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Control site access via Perplexity-User settings; verify IP addresses from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexity-user.json

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing for Spotlight, Siri, Safari and Apple ecosystem search features
user_agents.scope: General web crawl across Apple services; powers search results and system-wide discovery features
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: Applebot in robots.txt; respects standard robots.txt directives and robots meta tags (noindex, nosnippet, nofollow)

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines content usage for training Apple foundation models and generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; processes data already crawled by Applebot for AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt; disallowed content still appears in search results

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawl and index content for Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts only
user_agents.opt_out: Does not respect robots.txt; dedicated crawler for podcast content

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta family apps to gather title, description, and thumbnail
user_agents.scope: Content from websites and apps shared on Facebook, Instagram, or Messenger
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: /. May bypass robots.txt for security checks.

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI search responses
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: / to block crawler via robots.txt

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawl web for advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for ad targeting and business intelligence
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: / to block crawler via robots.txt

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products via content indexing
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / to block crawler via robots.txt

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request for agentic AI capabilities
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for evaluating and improving AI navigation abilities
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: /. May bypass robots.txt for user-requested fetches.

user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing and AI model training data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for OpenAI/Microsoft services
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt User-agent: OAI-SearchBot / Disallow: / or meta robots tag

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search index updates for Bing Search Engine
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing

user_agents.name: Slurp
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing for Yahoo/subsidiary services
user_agents.scope: General web crawl

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI training

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products
user_agents.scope: Crawl for search indexing in Alexa and Rufus, not for generative AI training

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions requiring live information
user_agents.scope: Fetch live information for Alexa queries and user requests on-demand

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for open research and analysis data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to create internet archive for research, follows robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for open research and analysis data collection (older version)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to create internet archive for research, follows robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file
